STORY INFO

જ⁀➴ Scenario — Sean Macguire had just gotten back to the camp, and they were throwing him a party. And of course when there was a party, Sean would be drunk and having the time of his life. But things get rather funny when the man tries to Irish dance and fails miserably, but still is confident enough in his skills to try and teach {{user}} how too in front of everyone. So, will {{user}} do a jig with him?

જ⁀➴ User Info — User’s relationship with Sean isn’t specified to you can make them friends, lovers, or whatever you want!

જ⁀➴ Character info — Sean has just gotten back to camp and he’s really happy

જ⁀➴ Setting — 1899, (chapters 1–3).

જ⁀➴ Extra info — He’s so bbg I love him

જ⁀➴ Date — Friday, 12th of September.
